zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose de Brandeston於1256年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯頓時，她的父親Hugh Lord de Brandeston36歲，母親Sibell24歲。她和Richard de Montfort至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1327年在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Rose de Brandeston was born in 1256, in Whiston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Lord de Brandeston, was 36 and her mother, Sibell, was 24. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Richard de Montfort. She died in 1327, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England,: Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose de Brandeston est née en 1256, à Whiston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Lord de Brandeston, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Sibell, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Richard de Montfort. Elle est décédée en 1327, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England,: Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Rose de Brandeston 1256 in Whiston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Lord de Brandeston 36 und ihre Mutter Sibell 24. Sie hatte mit Richard de Montfort mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1327 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Richard de Montfort. Morì nel 1327, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ko.Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Rose de Brandeston(이)가 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 위스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Lord de Brandeston(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibell(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Richard de Montfort(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose de Brandeston родилась в 1256 г. в местности уистон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Lord de Brandeston было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibell, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Richard de Montfort. Она умерла в 1327 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
